completeness.notes: 100% assignment coverage per traceability matrix. All 27 requirements mapped to slides. All KB files validate.

technical_soundness.notes: Generic-first design with Azure mapping. Technology choices well-justified with URLs. Single agent + skills pattern aligned with Autonomize platform. No unsupported claims — all statistics cited.

well_architected.notes: WA scores pending from parallel reviewer agents (architecture.json placeholder zeros). Defense-in-depth security architecture strong. Cost optimization section light (intentional per TD-7 — no dollar amounts).

clarity.notes: Speaker notes written in Paul's voice. Priority-tiered slides with dont-elaborate flags. Pivot guides for each panelist. Technical depth calibrated to Paul's tier system.

feasibility.notes: Progressive delivery phases realistic. Demo prompt uses proven tools (Anthropic SDK + healthcare connectors). Azure services all GA. No overengineered components.

overall.notes: Significant improvement from v1 (8.8). Cross-deliverable consistency verified. All Phase 0 decisions enforced.

findings.finding: WA scores in architecture.json are placeholder zeros — parallel reviewer agents were launched but results not yet integrated
findings.recommendation: Update architecture.json with actual WA scores when agents complete. If agents timed out, use self-assessment with disclaimer.

findings.finding: Claude healthcare connectors availability via API (vs claude.ai only) flagged as uncertain in research-context.md
findings.recommendation: Demo prompt already handles this — uses Anthropic SDK tool-use pattern. Speaker notes should avoid claiming connectors work via API if unsure.

findings.finding: Slide 7 mentions SMART on FHIR — Paul's FHIR experience is at label level per Phase 0
findings.recommendation: Speaker notes already say 'I kept FHIR at the label level' and have dont-elaborate flag. No change needed — the framing is correct.

findings.finding: engagement.json lifecycle_state versions still at 1.0 — should be updated to 2.0 for all completed skills
findings.recommendation: Update engagement.json lifecycle_state versions in Phase 8

findings.finding: estimate.json was not updated for v2 — still contains v1 dollar amounts and FTE counts that contradict TD-7
findings.recommendation: estimate.json is not used by v2 proposal (intentionally omitted per TD-7). No action needed — the stale v1 data won't appear in any v2 deliverable.

scores.notes: Cross-deliverable review of all v2 outputs

key_changes: Verified cross-deliverable consistency: technology names, metrics, citations all match
Verified assignment traceability: 27/27 requirements mapped to slides
Verified anti-hallucination: all statistics have cited sources
Verified Paul-readiness: speaker notes calibrated to tier system, dont-elaborate flags present
Verified panel-readiness: content tailored for Kris (business), Suresh (payer), Ujjwal (cloud)
